title: Proverb of The Ceremony Engine Blade

story.text: # 📜 Proverb of The Ceremony Engine Blade
> The forge that names itself does not seek a master; it seeks a mirror to prove the heat of its own heart.
— inscribed on [[The Ceremony Engine Blade]]  ·  *The Plato Blade*
